auditLog.title: API Audit Log
auditLog.desc: Recent API calls made by external clients like Paperback.

maintenance.statusAuditDesc: Periodically query AniList/MangaDex to check if Ongoing series have completed or entered Hiatus, updating your library automatically.
maintenance.statusAuditTriggeredMsg: Background review of all active series has been initiated.
maintenance.cleanupDesc: Scan your global library to locate and remove duplicate chapter files from disk, reclaiming storage space.
maintenance.cleanupFailedMsg: Failed to run duplicate chapters cleanup.
maintenance.metadataPriorityDesc: Choose which provider to use as the primary source for fetching manga covers, summaries, and genres.
maintenance.refreshDesc: Searches all manga missing a cover or summary and fetches their data from AniList, with automatic fallback to MangaDex for titles not found.

retryDelay.label: Bulk Retry Delay
retryDelay.description: Delay between each job when retrying all failed downloads. Helps avoid rate-limiting from sources like MangaDex.

auth.title: Authentication & Web Access Control
auth.desc: Protect your web interface by requiring credentials and establish a secure environment with exclusive access.
auth.unlockedDesc: The Accounts section is now visible in the main navigation menu.
auth.unlockedWarning: We highly recommend visiting the Accounts section to change the default password upon first reload or add users with custom roles.
auth.developerDesc: Enable external access to your library metadata via a secure REST API for third-party clients and custom scripts.
auth.docsDesc: Browse and test the available REST endpoints live using our Swagger interface.
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out of your current session?

users.title: Accounts Center & Access Control
users.description: Manage security and authorization levels for all users of the Kaizen platform.

defaultPasswordAlert.title: Warning! Default Admin Password Active
defaultPasswordAlert.desc: We have detected that your main admin account is still using the default password. For absolute security, please change it now using the form below.

adminPassword.title: Update Main Admin Password
adminPassword.desc: Change the password of the root admin account to secure downloader settings.

management.title: Local User Management
management.desc: Create sub-accounts with specific access roles: Admin (full control), Manager (downloads & library) or Reader (read-only library access).

list.title: Active Registered Users
list.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure you want to regenerate the API token for this user? Any applications using the old token will lose access.

tokenModal.title: API Token Generated
tokenModal.description: Please copy this token now. For security reasons, it will not be shown again.

delete.confirmDesc: Are you completely sure you want to revoke and delete access for user {{username}}?

notifications.passwordUpdatedDesc: Admin password has been changed successfully.
notifications.tokenGeneratedDesc: The API Token was successfully generated.
notifications.tokenCopiedDesc: The token has been copied to the clipboard.
notifications.roleUpdatedDesc: User role has been successfully updated.
notifications.userCreatedDesc: The new user account has been successfully registered.
notifications.userDeletedDesc: User access has been permanently revoked.
